source_files.main.spy:
from shapes import Rectangle, create_square, total_area

def main():
    rect = Rectangle(4.0, 5.0)
    print(rect.area())
    
    square = create_square(6.0)
    print(square.area())
    
    shapes: list[Shape] = [rect, square]
    print(len(shapes))
    
    combined = total_area(shapes)
    print(combined)
